rationale.oversight-explanation: Agents gather rationale, context, summaries, and guidance for human reviewers.
rationale.hitl-workflow: Humans retain authority to approve, reject, or request revisions.
rationale.ai-review: Specialized agents identify potential defects and suggest review comments.
rationale.counterpoint: Argues against automated review replacing humans and interpersonal benefits.
rationale.framework: Proposes a reusable agent-based architecture for code-review pipelines.
rationale.design-only: Architectural mechanism is specified, but implementation remains future work.
rationale.general-code: The platform reviews code generally, not specifically AI-generated code.
rationale.risk-quality: Defect finding, improvement, performance, and refactoring receive substantive treatment.
